title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
